leadText: Wise Glasses (Japanese: ものしりメガネ Wise Glasses) are a type of held item introduced in Generation IV. It boosts the power of the holder's special moves.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] Boosts the power of the holder's special moves by 10% (approximated as a multiplier of 4505/4096 from Generation V to Pokémon Scarlet and Violet ).
